commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an opt-in `includeFamily` selector to Gateway `chat.history` and `sessions_history` so callers can retrieve bounded reset-family transcript history.

PR surface: Source +445, Tests +505, Docs +5, Other +4. Total +959 across 36 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main has no `includeFamily` protocol/tool selector, and the PR tests/proof construct reset-family transcripts and topic archives; I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - There is one narrow mechanical blocker: refresh generated prompt snapshots so they no longer expose the removed `resetAncestors` alias.
